title: alchemilla pubescens var. bernensis
intro: Alchemilla pubescens var. bernensis, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial plant species in the family Rosaceae, native to Europe and known for its distinctive, velvety leaves and white or pinkish flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as menstrual cramps and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alchemilla pubescens var. bernensis include reducing menstrual pain and discomfort, promoting wound healing, and supporting the health of the digestive system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
